name: Submodel Reuse Demonstration - Track Consolidation
description: Demonstration of submodel reuse through track consolidation. 6 clients where 5 clients (0-4) all exclude the same specific client (client 5), which should create only 1 consolidated track for those 5 clients.

expected_tracks.track_c0_c1_c2_c3_c4_no5: For clients 0, 1, 2, 3, and 4, all excluding client 5
expected_tracks.global: Global track (for client 5 without specific disagreements)
